methods.description: This method examines the frequency estimation process when the sampling patterns for each data set are known, using periodogram-based methods and a proposed estimator.

steps.description: Use 4 zooming steps, starting with 16 initial bins with active threshold τ = 10−5, λ = 15, ζ(m) = 10 for all m, and q is a vector of ones.

steps.description: Compare the MSE of the proposed method to the CRB.

methods.description: This method applies the frequency estimation process to real data from ice cores, comparing the results to expected frequencies from orbital theory.

methods.description: This method describes a sparse reconstruction framework for estimating frequency content in paleoclimatology data, accounting for sampling uncertainties.

steps.description: Form the proposed estimator using a sparse reconstruction framework with a separate wideband dictionary for each data set.
